title: Proclamation No. 1716, s. 1978
text:
MALACAÑANG Manila

PROCLAMATION NO. 1716

RESERVING FOR MUNICIPAL GOVERNMENT CENTER SITE PURPOSES CERTAIN PARCELS OF LAND OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN JUAN, METROPOLITAN MANILA, ISLAND OF LUZON.

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Natural Resources and by virtue of the powers vested in me by law, I, FERDINAND E. MARCOS, President of the Philippines, do hereby withdraw from sale or settlement and reserve for municipal government center site purposes under the administration of the Municipal Government of San Juan, Metropolitan Manila, subject to private rights, if any there be, certain parcels of land of the public domain situated in the municipality of San Juan, Metropolitan Manila, Island of Luzon, which are more particularly described as follows:

Lot No. 5-E, Psu-73270

A PARCEL of land (Lot No. 5-E, Psu-73270) situated in the Municipality of San Juan, Metropolitan Manila, Island of Luzon. Bounded on the NW., along lines 1-2-3 by Santolan Road; on the NE., along line 3-4 by Lot 2, Blk-134, Swo-7237; along line 4-5 by Lot 1, Blk-134, Swo-7237; along line 5-6 by Street; on the SE., along line 6-7 by Lot 2, Blk-132, Swo-7237; along line 7-8 by Lot 3, Blk-132, Swo-7237; along line 8-9 by Callejon; along line 9-10 by Lot 4, Blk-132, Swo-7237; along line 10-11 by Lot 5, Blk-132, Swo-7237; along line 11-12 by Lot 6, Blk-132, Swo-7237; along line 12-13 by Lot 7, Blk-132, Swo-7237; on the SW., along line 13-14 by Lot 8, Blk-132, Swo-7237; along line 14-15 by Vda. de Rodriguez; along line 15-16 by Lot 16, Blk-1, Psu-50564; along line 16-17 by Blk-1, Psu-50564; along line 17-18 by Lot 15, Blk-1, Psu-50564; along line 18-19 by Lot 6, Blk-1, Psu-50564; along line 19-20 by Blk-1, Psu-50564; along line 20-21 by Lot 5, Blk-1, Psu-50564; and on the NW., along line 21-1 by Santolan Road.

Beginning at a point marked “1” of Lot 5-E, Psu-73270, being S. 74.55 E., 917.22 m. from BLLM No. 1, Municipality of San Juan;

point of beginning. Containing an area of FOURTEEN THOUSAND FIVE HUNDRED AND FORTY TWO (14,542) Square Meters. All points referred to are indicated on the plan and are marked on the ground by P.S. Cyl. Conc. Mons.

Lot No. 5-H-1, Psu-73270

A PARCEL of land (Lot No. 5-H-1, Psu-73270) situated in the Municipality of San Juan, Metropolitan Manila, Island of Luzon. Bounded on the S., along line 1-2 by Lot 5-F-3-B, Psu-73270; on the W., along line 2-3 by Lot 5-1, Psu-73270; on the NW., along line 3-4 by Lot 5-H-2, Psu-73270; on the NE., along line 4-5 by Lot 20, Blk-1, Magdalena Estate; and on the SE., along line 5-1 by Lot 5-F-3-B, Psu-73270.

Beginning at a point marked “1” of Lot 5-H-1, Psu-73270, being N. 88-48 E., 807.35 m. from BLLM No. 1, Municipality of San Juan;

point of beginning. Containing an area of ONE THOUSAND AND SEVENTY THREE (1,073) SQUARE METERS. All points referred to are indicated on the plan and are marked on the ground by P.S. Cyl. Conc. Mons.

Lot No. 5-H-2, Psu-73270

A PARCEL of land (Lot No. 5-H-2, Psu-73270) situated in the Municipality of San Juan, Metropolitan Manila, Island of Luzon. Bounded on the E., along line 1-2 by Lot 20, Blk-1, Magdalena Estate; on the SE., along line 2-3 by Lot 5-H-1, Psu-73270; on the W., along line 3-4 by Lot 1, Psu-32648 (Pedro Narciso); on the NW., along line 4-5 by Lot 11, Blk-1, Magdalena Estate; along line 5-6 by Lot 12, Blk-1 Magdalena Estate, along line 6-7 by Lot 14, Blk-1, Magdalena Estate; and on the NE., along line 7-8 by Lot 15, Blk-1, Magdalena Estate; along line 8-9 by Lot 16, Blk-1, Magdalena Estate; along line 9-10 by Lot 17, Blk-1, Magdalena Estate; along line 10-11 by Lot 18, Blk-1, Magdalena Estate; and along line 11-1 by Lot 19, Blk-1, Magdalena Estate.

Beginning at a point marked “1” of Lot 5-H-2, Psu-73270, being N. 84-53 E., 839.08 m. from BLLM No. 1, Municipality of San Juan;

point of beginning. Containing an area of SEVEN THOUSAND NINE HUNDRED AND FIFTEEN (7,915) SQUARE METERS. All points referred to are indicated on the plan and are marked on the ground by P.S. Cyl. Conc. Mons.

Lot No. 5-F-3-A, Psu-73270

A PARCEL of land (Lot No. 5-F-3-A, Psu-73270) situated in the Municipality of San Juan, Metropolitan Manila, Island of Luzon. Bounded on the SW., along lines 1-2-3 by Pinaglabanan Road; on the NW., along lines 3-4-5-6-7-8-9 by Lot 5-1, Psu-73270; on the SE., along lines 9-10-11 by Lot 5-F-3-B, Psu-73270; and on the S., along line 11-1 by Lot 5-F-1-A, Psu-73270.

Beginning at a point marked “1” of Lot 5-F-3-A, Psu-73270, being S. 70-18 E., 626.93 m. from BLLM No. 1, Municipality of San Juan;

point of beginning. Containing an area of THREE THOUSAND NINE HUNDRED AND SEVENTY FIVE (3,975) SQUARE METERS. All points referred to are indicated on the plan and are marked on the ground by P.S. Cyl. Conc. Mons.

Lot No. 5-F-3-B, Psu-73270

A PARCEL of land (Lot No. 5-F-3-B, Psu-73270) situated in the Municipality of San Juan, Metropolitan Manila, Island of Luzon. Bounded on the S., along line 1-2 by Lot 5-F-1, Psu-73270; on the W., and NW., along lines 2-3-4 by Lot 5-F-3-A, Psu-73270; on the N., along line 4-5 by Lot 1, Psu-32648 (Pedro Narciso); along lines 5-6-7 by Lot 5-H-1, Psu-73270; on the E., along line 7-8 by Lot 6, Psu-73675 (MWSS); along line 8-9 by Lot 1, Blk-1, Magdalena Estate; along line 9-10 by Lot 2, Blk-1, Magdalena Estate; and on the SE., along line 10-1 by Lot 5-F-3-C, Psu-73270.

Beginning at a point marked “1” of Lot 5-F-3-B, Psu-73270, being S. 85-35 E., 771.09 m. from BLLM No. 1, Municipality of San Juan;

point of beginning. Containing an area of SEVEN THOUSAND FOUR HUNDRED AND NINETY EIGHT (7,498) SQUARE METERS. All points referred to are indicated on the plan and are marked on the ground by P.S. Cyl. Conc. Mons.

Lot No. 5-F-3-C, Psu-73270

A PARCEL of land (Lot No. 5-F-3-C, Psu-73270) situated in the Municipality of San Juan, Metropolitan Manila, Island of Luzon. Bounded on the NW., along line 1-2 by Lot 5-F-3-B, Psu-73270; on the N., along lines 2-3-4 by Lot 2, Blk-1, Magdalena Estate; on the NE., along lines 4-5-6 by Lot 4, Blk-1, Magdalena Estate; on the SE., along line 6-1 by Lot 5-F-1, Psu-73270.

Beginning at a point marked “1” of Lot 5-F-3-C, Psu-73270, being S. 85-35 E., 771.09 m. from BLLM No. 1, Municipality of San Juan;

point of beginning. Containing an area of TWO THOUSAND THREE HUNDRED AND FIFTY TWO (2,352) SQUARE METERS. All points referred to are indicated on the plan and are marked on the ground by P.S. Cyl. Conc. Mons.

Lot No. 5-F-4, Psu-73270

A PARCEL of land (Lot No. 5-F-4, Psu-73270) situated in the Municipality of San Juan, Metropolitan Manila, Island of Luzon. Bounded on the NE., along line 1-2 by Lot 11, Psu-32645 (Juan Galmez); along line 2-3 by Lot 10, Psu-32645; (Placida Artiaga); on the SE., and S., along lines 3-4-5-6-7-8-9 by Santolan Road; and on the SW., along line 9-1 by Lot 5-F-1, Psu-73270.

Beginning at a point marked “1” of Lot 5-F-4, Psu-73270, being S. 54-33 E., 1166.16 m. from BLLM No. 1, Municipality of San Juan;

point of beginning. Containing an area of SIX THOUSAND TWO HUNDRED AND FIFTEEN (6,215) SQUARE METERS. All points referred to are indicated on the plan and are marked on the ground by P.S. Cyl. Conc. Mons. Bearings true. These lots were prepared by Elpidio J. Lolong, Geodetic Engineer, on June 8, 1977.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 17th day of February, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and seventy-eight.

(SGD.) FERDINAND E. MARCOS President of the Philippines

By the President:

(SGD.) JACOBO C. CLAVE Presidential Executive Assistant

Source: CDAsia
